summary: Comprehensive testing of Filo d'Olio pizzeria website completed successfully. All backend APIs functional, frontend features working as expected with professional Mediterranean olive green theme.

ui_bugs.issue: Delivery option in order type dropdown not fully selectable, defaults to pickup

issues: Minor console warnings for DialogContent accessibility descriptions

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Order creation, retrieval, and listing APIs working
Home page loads with hero, features, menu preview, contact sections
Navigation between all pages (Home, Menu, Order, Contact)
Menu categorization with tabs switching correctly
Cart functionality - adding items, size selection, quantity management
Professional olive green Mediterranean theme applied
Photo placeholders with pizza icons displaying correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Improve delivery dropdown selection in order form. Add aria-describedby for DialogContent components for better accessibility.
